name: Smart Wallet Stalker
description: Tracks selected public wallets and emits alerts when they buy, sell, rotate, or cluster around new tokens.
degenPitch: Watch the wallets that move first, without handing anyone your keys.
whatItDoes: Emits buy, sell, rotation, and cluster alerts.
Can connect to copy settings with caps and user-owned wallets.
cursorPrompt: Build a Smart Wallet Stalker using DNA x402. Watch selected public Solana wallets, emit paid alerts after receipt verification, make copy mode optional through copy settings, and never store private keys.
suggestedPrompt: Build a Smart Wallet Stalker using DNA x402. Watch selected public Solana wallets, emit paid alerts after receipt verification, make copy mode optional through copy settings, and never store private keys.
